title: stipa araxensis
intro: Stipa araxensis, also known as the Armenian wheat grass or wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Armenia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Stipa araxensis include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Stipa araxensis can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosages.
